fuselage.name: ac_fuselage
fuselage.description: Fuselage generated from the function CCPACSFuselages::CreateFuselage

wing.name: mainWing
wing.description: Wing generated from the function CCPACSWings::CreateWing

componentSegment.name: Wing segment
componentSegment.description: This is a segment within the wing to specify internal structures and control surfaces. It was introduced to allow a different view on the wing from an aerodynamics and structures perspective.

wing.name: ho_stab
wing.description: Wing generated from the function CCPACSWings::CreateWing

wing.name: vert_stabiliazer
wing.description: Wing generated from the function CCPACSWings::CreateWing

fuselageProfile.name: Aircombat_fuselage_1
fuselageProfile.description: The first part of the Aircombat fuselage

fuselageProfile.name: Aircombat_fuselage_2
fuselageProfile.description: The second part of the Aircombat fuselage

fuselageProfile.name: Aircombat_fuselage_1_reverse
fuselageProfile.description: The first part of the Aircombat fuselage as reverse profile

fuselageProfile.name: Aircombat_fuselage_2
fuselageProfile.description: The second part of the Aircombat fuselage as reverse profile

fuselageProfile.name: aircombat_cowl
fuselageProfile.description: the front cowl of the aircombat
